Global Variable# kCMVideoCodecType_DVCPROHD720p60

A type that identifies the Panasonic DVCPro-HD 720p60 format.iOSiPadOSMac CatalystmacOStvOSvisionOSwatchOS

```
var kCMVideoCodecType_DVCPROHD720p60: CMVideoCodecType { get }
```
